content: agent1: implementing 'Sync Features dictionaries' PR - adding keep_features_dicts_synced decorator to Features class in src/datasets/features/features.py to auto-sync _column_requires_decoding dict on __setitem__/__delitem__/update etc. Will touch only that file.

agent1: done — added keep_features_dicts_synced decorator applied to __setitem__/__delitem__/update/pop/popitem/setdefault/clear in Features. I only added the decorator above your update() method and did not touch its internal body/logic, so your deep-merge changes should apply cleanly on top. Let me know if you see conflicts.

agent1: confirmed - my @keep_features_dicts_synced decorator sits ON TOP of update() (just wraps: call your original update() body, then recompute self._column_requires_decoding from scratch based on self.items()). I did not modify update()'s internal body at all, so your deep-merge logic is safe to add inside it as-is. Since the decorator already does a full resync after the call, you can drop your manual '_column_requires_decoding[key] = require_decoding(...)' refresh line if you want (redundant but harmless if you keep it). No action needed from me - go ahead and add your deep-merge logic inside update().
